citation: Law on Advertising No. 16/2012/QH13 — Article 33 (Foreign advertising service and cross-border advertising)
summary: Cross-border or foreign-origin brand advertising directed at Vietnamese consumers may require prior approval or local agent arrangements; enforcement practice is uneven.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Foreign brand campaigns, cross-border influencer ads, or offshore entity as advertiser targeting Vietnam. ACTION: REVIEW — flag for legal confirmation of approval pathway; do not auto-BLOCK. CHECK: Advertiser entity, local agent, platform, and product import status. ESCALATE IF: Regulated product category (TPCN, cosmetics, medical devices) without local registration.
